name: Paycom Software, Inc.
description: Paycom Software, Inc. is a leading provider of comprehensive, cloud-based human capital management (HCM) software. Headquartered in Oklahoma City, the company offers a single-database solution that streamlines the entire employment lifecycle, from recruitment and onboarding to payroll, time and labor management, and talent management. By integrating these critical HR functions into one platform, Paycom eliminates the need for multiple systems, enhancing data integrity, security, and operational efficiency for businesses of all sizes. Since its founding in 1998, Paycom has remained dedicated to innovation and automation, empowering organizations to simplify complex HR processes and improve employee experiences.
